articles.title: Vinesh Phogat row: WFI not to challenge ruling but Asian Games berth remains uncertain for veteran

However, her Asian Games participation remains uncertain because her name is missing from the official athletes’ list already submitted. Even if she wins trials, approval from international authorities may still be required.

Super Sunday's matches will determine which two dreams end and one advances.

articles.title: NFL Trade Rumors: Dallas Cowboys linked to $4M Arizona Cardinals pass rusher in potential NFC-shaking move
articles.description: The Dallas Cowboys are being linked to Arizona Cardinals pass rusher Josh Sweat as trade rumors continue to build around the veteran defender. Reports claim Sweat is unhappy with his contract situation, with the Eagles and Packers also monitoring the market. Dallas’ connection through defensive coordinator Christian Parker makes the fit intriguing, especially as the Cowboys search for another reliable edge rusher to strengthen their defense heading into the 2026 NFL season.
